# bboudata

`bboudata` provides sample survival and recruitment data for boreal
caribou.

## Installation

You can install the latest version of `bboudata` from
[GitHub](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/bboudata) with:

``` R
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("poissonconsulting/bboudata")
```

## Demonstration

``` R
library(tibble) # to enhance readability
#> Warning: package 'tibble' was built under R version 4.5.3

bboudata::bbourecruit_a
#> # A tibble: 696 × 9
#>   PopulationName  Year Month   Day  Cows Bulls UnknownAdults Yearlings Calves
#>   <chr>          <int> <int> <int> <int> <int>         <int>     <int>  <int>
#> 1 A               1990     3     9     1     1             0         0      0
#> 2 A               1990     3     9     5     1             0         0      0
#> 3 A               1990     3     9     4     1             0         0      0
#> 4 A               1990     3     9     2     0             0         0      0
#> 5 A               1990     3     9     6     0             0         0      0
#> # ℹ 691 more rows

bboudata::bbousurv_a
#> # A tibble: 364 × 6
#>   PopulationName  Year Month StartTotal MortalitiesCertain MortalitiesUncertain
#>   <chr>          <int> <int>      <int>              <int>                <int>
#> 1 A               1986     1          0                  0                    0
#> 2 A               1986     2          8                  0                    0
#> 3 A               1986     3          8                  0                    0
#> 4 A               1986     4          8                  0                    0
#> 5 A               1986     5          8                  0                    0
#> # ℹ 359 more rows
```

## bbou Suite

`bboudata` is part of the bbou suite of tools. Other packages in this
suite include:

- [bboutools](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/bboutools)
- [bbouretro](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/bbouretro)
- [bboushiny](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/bboushiny)
- [bbousims](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/bbousims)

## Contribution

Please report any
[issues](https://github.com/poissonconsulting/bboudata/issues).

## Code of Conduct

Please note that the bboudata project is released with a [Contributor
Code of
Conduct](https://contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.html).
By contributing to this project, you agree to abide by its terms.

## Licensing

Copyright 2022-2023 Integrated Ecological Research and Poisson
Consulting Ltd.  
Copyright 2024 Province of Alberta

The documentation is released under the [CC BY 4.0
License](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)

The code is released under the [Apache License
2.0](https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0)

# Package index

## Recruitment

- [`bbourecruit_a`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbourecruit_a.md)
  : Sample Data for Population A
- [`bbourecruit_b`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbourecruit_b.md)
  : Sample Data for Population B
- [`bbourecruit_c`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbourecruit_c.md)
  : Sample Data for Population C
- [`bbourecruit_multi`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbourecruit_multi.md)
  : Sample Data for Multiple Populations
- [`bbourecruit_missing`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbourecruit_missing.md)
  : Sample Data with Unobserved Years
- [`bbourecruit_sim1`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbourecruit_sim1.md)
  : Simulated Data for Scenario 1
- [`bbourecruit_sim2`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbourecruit_sim2.md)
  : Simulated Data for Scenario 2
- [`bbourecruit_sim3`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbourecruit_sim3.md)
  : Simulated Data for Scenario 3
- [`bbourecruit_sim4`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbourecruit_sim4.md)
  : Simulated Data for Scenario 4

## Survival

- [`bbousurv_a`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbousurv_a.md)
  : Sample Data for Population A
- [`bbousurv_b`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbousurv_b.md)
  : Sample Data for Population B
- [`bbousurv_c`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbousurv_c.md)
  : Sample Data for Population C
- [`bbousurv_multi`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbousurv_multi.md)
  : Sample Data for Multiple Populations
- [`bbousurv_annual`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbousurv_annual.md)
  : Sample Data for Annual Survival Data
- [`bbousurv_missing`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbousurv_missing.md)
  : Sample Data with Unobserved Years
- [`bbousurv_sim1`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbousurv_sim1.md)
  : Simulated Data for Scenario 1
- [`bbousurv_sim2`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbousurv_sim2.md)
  : Simulated Data for Scenario 2
- [`bbousurv_sim3`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbousurv_sim3.md)
  : Simulated Data for Scenario 3
- [`bbousurv_sim4`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbousurv_sim4.md)
  : Simulated Data for Scenario 4

## Check Data

- [`bbd_chk_data_recruitment()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbd_chk_data_recruitment.md)
  : Check recruitment data structure
- [`bbd_chk_data_survival()`](https://poissonconsulting.github.io/bboudata/reference/bbd_chk_data_survival.md)
  : Check survival data structure
